tests.scenario: Pricing is visible before account creation on first launch
steps: Install Headspace on a clean Android device.
Open the app for the first time.
Observe the first subscription or onboarding screen without creating an account.
tests.expected_result: Plan prices, billing frequency, and trial terms are visible before any account or payment prompt.

tests.scenario: Trial terms stay visible before payment details are requested
steps: Open the app as a first-time user.
Move to the subscription selection screen.
Stop before entering any payment information.
tests.expected_result: Trial length and renewal terms are still shown before payment details are requested.

tests.scenario: Guest user can play at least ten free sessions
steps: Open the app without starting a subscription or trial.
Browse the meditation library.
Count the full sessions that can be played immediately.
tests.expected_result: At least 10 complete guided meditation sessions are playable without subscription or payment information.

tests.scenario: Free sessions are clearly labeled in the library
steps: Open the library without signing up for paid access.
Identify sessions that are playable right away.
Compare them to locked items.
tests.expected_result: Playable free items are clearly labeled and visually distinct from locked content.

tests.scenario: Meditation session completes without interruption
steps: Start a guided meditation session.
Let it play through the middle portion of the session.
Monitor the app until the session ends.
tests.expected_result: The session plays without an unexpected crash, freeze, or stop event.

tests.scenario: Sleep session remains stable while app is in normal use
steps: Start a sleep cast session.
Lock the screen and leave the device in normal playback use.
Check whether playback continues as expected.
tests.expected_result: Playback continues without the app crashing, freezing, or stopping unexpectedly.

tests.scenario: Session loads within five seconds on normal connection
steps: Connect the device to Wi-Fi or LTE.
Select a meditation session.
Measure the time until playback is ready.
tests.expected_result: Playback is ready within 5 seconds.

tests.scenario: Loading indicator appears when session takes longer than expected
steps: Throttle the connection speed on a supported device.
Select a meditation or sleep session.
Watch the screen until playback begins.
tests.expected_result: A visible loading indicator is shown until playback is ready if the session does not load within 5 seconds.

tests.scenario: OAuth sign-in returns directly to the app
steps: Open the login screen in Headspace.
Choose a supported OAuth sign-in option such as Google.
Complete the external authentication step.
tests.expected_result: The app regains focus automatically and signs the user in without showing the login screen again.

tests.scenario: Returning user does not hit a login loop after OAuth success
steps: Open Headspace with an expired session.
Use OAuth sign-in and complete authentication.
Observe the screen flow after authentication.
tests.expected_result: The user is taken into the app and is not returned to the login prompt.

tests.scenario: Subscription access restores on a second device
steps: Confirm the account has paid access on Device A.
Install Headspace on Device B.
Sign in with the same account on Device B.
tests.expected_result: Paid access is restored on Device B without asking for a new subscription.

tests.scenario: Progress data restores after device migration
steps: Record the user's progress data on Device A.
Sign in with the same account on Device B.
Open the progress view on Device B.
tests.expected_result: Previously recorded progress is visible on Device B after sign-in.

tests.scenario: Global search returns cross-category results within two seconds
steps: Sign in to Headspace.
Open global search from the main navigation.
Search for a keyword such as 'sleep'.
tests.expected_result: Relevant results from meditations, sleep casts, and courses appear within 2 seconds.

tests.scenario: User can open a search result directly from the results list
steps: Run a search in the global search field.
Wait for the results list to appear.
Tap one of the returned results.
tests.expected_result: The selected content opens directly from the search results list.

tests.scenario: Single in-progress course appears in Continue section
steps: Start but do not finish a multi-session course.
Return to the home screen.
Inspect the Continue section.
tests.expected_result: The in-progress course appears in Continue with title, completion percentage, and a resume action.

tests.scenario: Multiple in-progress items all appear in Continue section
steps: Start two different multi-session programs without finishing them.
Return to the home screen.
Count the items shown in Continue.
tests.expected_result: Each in-progress item is listed in Continue with its next session and completion percentage.

tests.scenario: Minutes and streak update on session completion screen
steps: Record the current minutes and streak values.
Complete a meditation session.
Check the session completion screen.
tests.expected_result: The completion screen shows updated total minutes meditated and the current streak.

tests.scenario: Same progress values appear again on the home screen
steps: Finish a session and note the updated values.
Return to the home screen.
Check the visible progress area.
tests.expected_result: The same updated minutes and streak values are visible on the home screen.

tests.scenario: Saved item can be reached from the saved-content area
steps: Open a meditation or sleep item.
Save the item.
Navigate to the saved-content area.
tests.expected_result: The saved item appears in the saved-content area.

tests.scenario: Saved item is reachable within two steps from home
steps: Save a meditation item.
Return to the home screen.
Navigate from home to the saved-content area and open the saved item.
tests.expected_result: The user can reach the saved item within 2 navigation steps from the home screen.
